title: Quest Toastie Maker Sandwich Toaster Black/Easy Clean Non Stick Plates/Cool Touch Handle/750W/35129
features: CLASSIC TOASTIE MAKER – This Quest sandwich toastie maker is perfect for making two toasted sandwiches at a time, and instantly elevating the status of your lunchtime meal!

NON-STICK – The hot plates that toast the bread are non-stick, meaning your hot sandwich will slide right out onto the plate once cooked. The toastie maker also features power and ready lights to indicate when your machine is at the optimum temperature to begin the toasting process.

NON-SLIP – This toastie maker features 4 non-slip rubber feet which keep the machine anchored whilst in use. There is also an ergonomic cool touch handle that allows you to reposition the toastie maker mid-use without the risk of burning your hand.

GET CREATIVE – As well as the classic cheese toastie, this hot sandwich maker can produce new unique toasties too. Why not experiment with sausage & bean, ham & pineapple or even go savoury with Nutella & banana.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Secure Locking Lid The lids feature a clip to help them securely lock in place, keeping food inside during heating. Non-Stick Plates The non-stick plates ensure easy, quick cleaning, and produce toasties with less fats and oils. Indicator Lights The top of each unit features power and ready indicator lights to show you when it is in use. Cool Touch Handle The handle is made to be cool to the touch, ensuring you can open and close it safely at any time. Three Colours Choose from a black, white, or red coloured model - they are easily used and stored in any kitchen.
